title: Keano Brown’s murder-accused to appear in regional court
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The 30-year-old man accused of fatally stabbing Keano Brown (23) in Ext 13, Mossel Bay in July briefly appeared in the Mossel Bay Regional Court on Tuesday 23 September.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The 30-year-old man accused of fatally stabbing Keano Brown (23) in Ext 13, Mossel Bay in July briefly appeared in the Mossel Bay Regional Court on Tuesday 23 September."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Claytin Williams allegedly stabbed Brown in Cob Street on the night of July 6. Brown was rushed to hospital where he later died from his wounds. Williams was arrested later that same evening."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On 16 July, Williams abandoned his bail application, and remains behind bars. He is set to appear in court again on 23 October when the matter is expected to be transferred to the Mossel Bay Regional Court.","html":"On 16 July, Williams abandoned his bail application, and remains behind bars. He is set to appear in court again on 23 October when the matter is expected to be transferred to the Mossel Bay Regional Court."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous articles:","html":"Previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["Mossel Bay local Keano Brown (23) murdered","More than 800 attend Keano Brown's funeral"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Keano Brown’s murder-accused to appear in regional court
